text: GRANDE RONDE HOSPITAL WOMEN'S AND CHILDREN'S CLINIC CHILDREN'S CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides patient centered pediatric care. 710 Sunset Drive Suite E La Grande, OR 97850 Eligibility: Ages 0-18 Free Clinic: Ages 0-18 and uninsured Hours: Monday-Friday 7:30am-6pm, Saturday 8am-5pm Free clinic: Fridays 7am-6pm (541) 663-3150 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 663-3150 After hours (541) 963-8421 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP and private insurance. Payment plans and financial assistance may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by language line AREA SERVED: Baker and Union Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 7:30am-6pm, Saturday 8am-5pm Services: Pediatrics Other Services Offered At This Location: SPECIALTY MEDICINE - WOMEN'S CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
